groups.theme: Users want the app to be available in more languages, or they encountered untranslated content.
example_reviews: It is good app but you cannot change te language
Would be perfect if there were more language available + ability to sync our results online so we can access them from several devices
It's so good ! It definitely help to increase your mantel health ! But a little problem with this that it is not available in Hindi language !

groups.theme: Users express frustration about the paywall blocking all the usefull features
example_reviews: Free trial only... They ask for way too much personal information only to tell you to pay. Very deceiving..

Now all of a sudden when I get a notification that I have a new insight it's locked and I guess I'd have to pay to read it. Not very helpful in a crisis situation. Are there any truly free mental health apps that aren't trying to sell me something?
I'm sure this app is great but it's mostly locked and for paid members. I couldn't get much out of it without paying. Could potentially be used as a mood tracker but not much else.

groups.theme: Users reported issues with the app's notification system.
example_reviews: not getting notifications to answer the questions
Only been using a few days. So far so good. I hate the reminders come at odd times and I miss them.

groups.theme: privacy and data sharing concerns, with users worring about thier data being exploited
example_reviews: It's a really great app, unfortunately it shares device IDs with third parties (according to Play) which is not optional and does not work offline. I like the idea but tracking is an absolute no go with apps that handle data this sensitive.

Was great until I read privacy agreement. They give your data to Facebook for marketing purposes using your mobile device's ad ID. I took screenshots of my last ~2 years of data and just uninstalled the program.
Stuck in setup because it is not possible to use anonymously as advertised on the website. In step 3 I have to log in or create an account. No option to skip.

groups.theme: Users enjoying the saily mood tracking and journaling features, and finding them helpful for self-reflection and mental health management.
example_reviews: So far so good. I like that the questions are different every time. Answering the questions and adding a journal entries makes me take a pause to reflect on how I am doing in the here and now. The insights are pretty cool. I wish there were more emotion options. I am not sure yet, if it is worth it for me to pay but the free version is working.

This app is great and it's completely free! You check in with your mood and answer a handful of questions a few times a day (all private of course), you can look at any of the material, there is a course you can follow, depending on what you feel you need (like if you are exhausted, or if you want to increase strength mentally and physically, etc). Highly recommended!
